title: Fix critical issues in orchestrator refactor before merge
context:
Review of worker.py and orchestrator.py refactor found 6 critical issues blocking integration:

1. C1: engine.py still imports old worker.py instead of worker_manager.py
2. C2: Code duplication - both worker.py and worker_manager.py exist
3. C3: Independent DB sessions introduce race condition risk
4. C4: No tests for new worker modules
5. C5: No tests for new router modules
6. C6: Race condition in reflection completion handler

Full review: /Users/lobs/lobs-server/review-notes.md

The refactor is well-structured but cannot be merged until these are fixed. Risk: DB corruption from race conditions, regression from missing tests.
acceptance:
- Engine imports worker_manager.py, old worker.py deleted
- All tests pass with new modules
- Test coverage ≥80% for worker_manager, worker_gateway, worker_errors
- Reflection race condition fixed with locking
- Independent DB session usage documented with clear rationale OR reverted to single-session pattern
- README updated with refactor notes
